requirements: plan hash is not equal to a registered recipe/template hash
at least two distinct agent-composable capabilities are combined
at least one temporal or relational operator is used
no production code or prompt change is made for the request
first execution is a cache MISS
execution produces real results or an honest zero-result set
results have complete traces and evidence
UI labels the plan New experimental composition

passes_only_if: the plan is structurally different from every registered recipe and template
the plan combines at least two agent-composable capabilities
the plan uses temporal or relational logic
no code change, prompt change, recipe change, or runtime change is made for the request
the resulting plan hash is new
execution runs honestly over real deployed match data
results contain traces and evidence, or return an honest zero-result set
UI and trace label the source as HERMES_NOVEL_COMPOSITION
why_it_fails_today: Live model-mode interpretation returned HTTP 500 during audit.
The deployed compiler evidence supports approved recipe selection and corridor-template drafting, not a proven structurally new ad hoc composition.
The UI does not expose HERMES_NOVEL_COMPOSITION as a distinct source label.
No observed live run produced a new plan hash different from registered recipe/template hashes.

provenance_rule: A plan must never appear AI-authored when it was loaded from a reviewed recipe, selected manually as a preset, or produced by deterministic host repair/fallback.
summary: The deployed Workbench proves approved recipe execution and experimental corridor-template execution, but it does not currently prove ad hoc Hermes-authored novel composition in the product journey.

evidence.live_model_interpretation: HTTP 500 observed for supported, ambiguous, unsupported, and novel candidate prompts on 2026-06-22
evidence.ui_labeling: Interpreted panel shows recipe state/status but not New experimental composition.

candidate_requests.natural_language_request: Find possessions where the ball-side block shifts, then an opposite-side forward lane opens within five seconds.
candidate_requests.why_no_saved_recipe_matches: There is a registered experimental opposite-corridor plan in the repo, but it is not exposed as a deployed Hermes-authored ad hoc composition.
candidate_requests.plan_structure: wide-entry and block-shift predicates gate an opposite-side corridor relation and destination-entry classification
candidate_requests.evidence_completeness: repo plan requests relation id, destination region, duration, and destination entry fields; overlay geometry remains incomplete
candidate_requests.recommendation: Use as hero composition only after Hermes authors it live and UI labels it as a new composition.

candidate_requests.natural_language_request: Show possessions where a progressive corridor opens after the defending block has moved toward the ball side.
candidate_requests.why_no_saved_recipe_matches: This combines the approved block-shift spine and corridor availability; current UI tends to map to one selected preset rather than composing both live.
candidate_requests.plan_structure: temporal block-shift episode followed by corridor episode within a configured window
candidate_requests.evidence_completeness: would need open/close corridor frames and block-shift centroid evidence

candidate_requests.natural_language_request: Find possessions where the defence shifts to the ball side but the retained possession still has a clear forward connection.
candidate_requests.why_no_saved_recipe_matches: It requires combining retained-no-switch block-shift outcome with a corridor relation.
candidate_requests.plan_structure: approved block-shift outcome plus anchor-relative corridor availability

recommended_hero_composition: Find possessions where the ball-side block shifts, then an opposite-side forward lane opens within five seconds.
acceptance_needed: Hermes proposes the plan from natural language without selecting an existing recipe.
Bound plan hash differs from registered template hashes.
First execution is a MISS and subsequent execution is a HIT.
Replay shows exact evidence, with corridor open/close interval and block-shift evidence available or explicitly hidden.
UI badge says New experimental composition.
